problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
